query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS jobs_v2 (
  id integer PRIMARY KEY GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY,
  org_id integer NOT NULL,
  title text NOT NULL,
  description text,
  created_at timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  updated_at timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL
);
